title: senecio × berythaeus
intro: Senecio × berythaeus, also known as the hybrid groundsel, is a hybrid plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio × berythaeus include its use in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and leaves to make a tincture.
